scripts.build: npm run build -w @bta/shared-schema && npm run build -w @bta/game-state && npm run build -w @bta/insight-engine && npm run build -w @bta/realtime-api && npm run build -w @bta/coach-dashboard && npm run build -w @bta/ipad-operator
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --restart-tries -1 --restart-after 2000 --names api,operator,coach --prefix-colors cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:operator" "npm run dev:coach"
